{
  "format": "llmario-theme-v1",
  "id": "jungle-3level",
  "title": "LLMario Jungle Master — Two Rows + Slope Asset Set",
  "sourceFormat": "llmcart-toybox-recipe",
  "sourceCartVersion": 10,
  "notes": [
    "Extracted from a truth-marked legacy llmcart/theme file.",
    "This file is an asset/theme pack: it defines images, recipes, placeables, and collision truth, not level layout.",
    "Maps should reference these asset/placeable ids instead of embedding base64 image data."
  ],
  "primer": {
    "baseline": "Built for super_llmario_toybox_cart_v65_row_camera_latched_seam.htmlz. It assumes the v62 image-asset loader/seam fix and the v65 latched row-camera seam.",
    "history": [
      "v60 normalized cartridge placement so generated scenery and blocks stop being bananas.",
      "v62 proved PNG-bundled OpenGameArt carts can be self-contained and coherent.",
      "v65 proved row-camera falling works when the row switch is latched and direction-gated.",
      "This cart is the first small gameplay pass: not a camera demo, not a maze, but stacked Mario-ish strips with a readable fall seam.",
      "v67 theme-box pass: added jungle-skinned imageBlock recipes for info, reward, inert, and used bonk boxes while preserving v66/v67 engine behavior.",
      "v5 replaces the chunky pixel-ish jungle box skins with smoother illustrated box skins that match the jungle/BrownNature world art more closely.",
      "Jungle Master merge v1: preserved MY two-row level layout and added missing JUNGLE slope/dark BrownNature asset images plus platform recipes; no JUNGLE test geometry imported."
    ],
    "generatorRules": [
      "Think in rows, not a freeform vertical maze. Main/upper row leads into a readable drop; lower row catches and continues play.",
      "A required row fall should give the player something to do during the reframe: coin trail, enemy target, or landing choice.",
      "Keep landing surfaces wide after row seams. Save precise hard jumps for after the player has regained control.",
      "Upper-row gaps and lower-row recovery should rejoin the left-to-right rhythm quickly; no wandering maze topology.",
      "Use coins as gameplay arrows, not confetti. Coin arcs should show jump/fall intent."
    ],
    "rowCameraIntent": "The fall near x≈2260 is deliberate. It should read as: leave upper row, seam hold/pan, adjust fall, stomp or dodge the lower-row blob, then keep moving."
  },
  "engineContract": "toybox-recipe-side-scroller-v1+image-assets-v1+row-camera-latched-seam-v1+solid-image-sprites-v1+bonk-box-contract-v1+slope-platforms-v1+image-slope-skins-v1+solid-underside-guard-v1",
